basic_details.job_title: CEIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for DGM, Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Certification Engineers International Limited (CEIL) has officially announced the Finance & Accounts Personnel Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. CEIL/HR&A/Advt./2026-27/01 on the official CEIL website. Candidates who meet the prescribed age criteria of up to 50 years (depending on the post) and hold a Graduate degree along with a professional qualification as Chartered Accountant (CA) or Cost Accountant (CMA) can now submit their online applications. The application process is currently open and will continue until 15 June 202

age_limit.age_details: Max age varies by post: 50, 47, 35, 30 years as of 30.04.2026.
age_limit.details: DGM(F&A): Maximum age 50 years. Age relaxation for PwD is 10 years, and for Ex-Servicemen is as per Govt. of India guidelines. AGM(F&A): Maximum age 47 years. Age relaxation for PwD is 10 years, and for Ex-Servicemen is as per Govt. of India guidelines. Dy. Manager (F&A): Maximum age 35 years. Age relaxation for PwD is 10 years, and for Ex-Servicemen is as per Govt. of India guidelines. Officer (F&A): Maximum age 30 years. Age relaxation for PwD is 10 years, and for Ex-Servicemen is as per Govt. of India guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with professional qualification as Chartered Accountant (CA) or Cost Accountant (CMA).
qualification.details: Deputy General Manager (F&A)/Asst. General Manager(AGM)(F&A): Graduate (full time with minimum 55% marks) from a recognized university having professional qualification as Chartered Accountant (CA) from The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Cost Accountant (CMA) from The Institute of Cost Accountants of India. Minimum 18 years of Post qualification working Experience for AGM(F&A) and Minimum 22 years of Post qualification working Experience for DGM(F&A). Deputy Manager (F&A): Graduate (full time with minimum 60% marks) from a recognized university having professional qualification as Chartered Accountant (CA) from The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Cost Accountant (CMA) from The Institute of Cost Accountants of India. Minimum six years of Post qualification working experience. Officer (F&A): Graduate (full time with minimum 60% marks) from a recognized university having professional qualification as Chartered Accountant (CA) from The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Cost Accountant (CMA) from The Institute of Cost Accountants of India. Minimum One years of Post qualification working experience.

salary_details.details: Deputy General Manager (F&A)/Asst. General Manager(AGM)(F&A): Rs.90000-240000 (IDA 2017) for DGM(F&A), Rs 80000-220000 (IDA 2017) for AGM(F&A). Deputy Manager (F&A): Rs.50000-160000 (IDA 2017). Officer (F&A): Rs.30000-120000 (IDA 2017). | Selected candidates will be placed at the minimum Basic Pay in Pay Scale indicated for the post. Besides Basic Pay, candidates will also be paid Industrial Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance / Company Accommodation, wherever available and will also be entitled for other perquisites & allowances / benefits such as Leave, Medical Facilities, Contributory Provident Fund, Gratuity, NPS, Group Personal Accident Insurance, Performance Related Pay (PRP) etc. as per extant Company Rules.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CEIL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CEIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the CEIL Finance & Accounts Personnel posts is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates with a professional qualification as a Chartered Accountant (CA) or Cost Accountant (CMA) from a recognized institution to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in this CEIL recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Finance & Accounts Personnel posts in Certification Engineers International Limited (CEIL).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Officer (F&A) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Officer (F&A) post is 30 years as of 30th April 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Deputy Manager (F&A) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Deputy Manager (F&A) post ranges from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 1,60,000 per month as per IDA 2017 pay scales.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the CEIL Finance & Accounts Personnel jobs?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply online through the official CEIL recruitment portal. The application link and further instructions are provided in the article.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this CEIL recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Finance & Accounts Personnel posts at CEIL primarily involves an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the cut-off date for calculating experience and age?
faq.answer: The cut-off date for calculating both post-qualification experience and age for this recruitment is 30th April 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Does CEIL offer any other benefits besides salary?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates will be entitled to Industrial Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance, Company Accommodation, Leave, Medical Facilities, Contributory Provident Fund, Gratuity, NPS, and other benefits as per company rules.
